children.heading: Applicability of definitions in title 10
children.label: a Applicability of definitions in title 10
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), the definitions provided in apply to the provisions of this chapter.section 101 of title 10

children.heading: Active duty
children.label: 1 Active duty
children.text: The term “active duty” means full-time duty in the active service of a uniformed service.

children.heading: Grade
children.label: 2 Grade
children.text: The term “grade” means a step or degree, in a graduated scale of office or rank, that is established and designated as a grade by law or regulation.

children.heading: Officer
children.label: 3 Officer
children.text: The term “officer” means an officer of the commissioned corps.

children.heading: Officer candidate
children.label: 4 Officer candidate
children.text: The term “officer candidate” means an individual who is enrolled in the basic officer training program of the Administration and is under consideration for appointment as an officer under .section 3021(a)(2)(A) of this title

children.heading: Flag officer
children.label: 5 Flag officer
children.text: The term “flag officer” means an officer serving in, or having the grade of, vice admiral, rear admiral, or rear admiral (lower half).

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 6 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Commerce.

children.heading: Administration
children.label: 7 Administration
children.text: The term “Administration” means the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration.

children.heading: Under Secretary
children.label: 8 Under Secretary
children.text: The term “Under Secretary” means the Under Secretary of Commerce for Oceans and Atmosphere.
